description: Verification harness for PR #6064 'fix: populate Status.Selector in CacheEngine for worker pod discovery'. Additive tests only; no production code touched.

findings.note: getWorkerSelectors() string must match the labels worker pods actually carry (getCommonLabelsFromComponent). Both PASS on PR head => correct.

CacheRuntime CRD has NO scale subresource, so Status.Selector is inert for HPA. PASSES while the gap exists; FLIPS to fail once a scale subresource with selectorpath=.status.selector is added — then invert/promote it.

liveNote: No live (L3) layer: change is a pure label-selector string + a static CRD-shape check; unit layer is authoritative. A real HPA end-to-end test is only meaningful AFTER a scale subresource is added to the CacheRuntime CRD (see Finding 2).
